title.rendered: 4 Lifespan Extending Tips For Flat Roofs

content.rendered:
Flat roofing in Calgary has become a popular choice for commercial and residential properties due to its sleek, modern appearance and practicality. However, unlike sloped roofs, flat roofs require specific maintenance to ensure they stand the test of time in Calgary’s ever-changing climate. Check out these five essential tips for flat roof maintenance, whether for your home or business.

Tip #1 – Regular Inspections: The Foundation of Maintenance

Regular inspections are the cornerstone of flat roof maintenance for residential and commercial roofing in Calgary. Calgary’s climate can go to extremes, with temperature fluctuations and the occasional heavy snowfall. To prevent minor issues from escalating into costly repairs, schedule inspections at least twice a year – ideally in the spring and fall. After severe weather events, such as storms or heavy snowfall, performing a post-event inspection is crucial.

During these inspections, keep an eye out for:

  • Ponding Water: Areas where water accumulates on your flat roof, causing it to “pond.”
  • Cracks or Blisters: Signs of damage that may have developed over time.
  • Wear and Tear: Any signs of general wear and tear on the roofing membrane.
  • Drainage Issues: Ensure drains and gutters are clear of debris to avoid ponding water.
  • HVAC and Other Rooftop Installations: Check that rooftop installations and penetrations are properly sealed.

Addressing these issues can prevent more extensive damage and prolong your flat roof’s lifespan.

Tip #2 – Regular Cleaning is Necessary For Flat Roofing in Calgary

Keeping your flat roof clean is crucial for its longevity. Debris, such as leaves, branches, and other foreign objects, can accumulate over time and clog drainage systems. This obstruction can lead to ponding water, which can, in turn, cause leaks and structural damage. Regularly clean flat residential and commercial roofing in Calgary of debris, and pay particular attention to the areas around drains and scuppers to ensure proper water flow. 

Tip #3 – Flat Roofing in Calgary: Tackling Ponding Water Head-On

Ponding water is a common concern with flat roofing in Calgary. It occurs when water collects on your flat roof and doesn’t drain correctly. Prolonged ponding water can compromise the integrity of both commercial and residential roofing in Calgary, potentially leading to leaks and structural damage.

To address ponding water:

  • Ensure Proper Drainage: Ensure your flat roof has an adequate drainage system directing water away from the roof’s surface.
  • Clear Drains: Regularly inspect and clear drains, gutters, and downspouts to prevent blockages.
  • Professional Assessment: If ponding water persists, consult a professional specializing in flat roofing in Calgary. They can assess your roof’s condition and recommend necessary repairs or modifications.

Tip #4 – Preventative Roof Coatings: Shielding Your Investment

Consider applying a roof coating as part of your flat roof maintenance plan. Roof coatings act as a protective barrier, shielding your roof from UV rays, extreme temperatures, and moisture. They can significantly extend the lifespan of flat commercial and residential roofing in Calgary and reduce the risk of damage.

The benefits of roof coatings include:

  • Extended Lifespan: Roof coatings can help your flat roof last longer by shielding it from the elements.
  • Energy Efficiency: Reflective coatings can reduce heat absorption, making your building more energy-efficient.
  • Waterproofing: Coatings create a waterproof barrier that prevents water intrusion.
  • Reduced Maintenance Costs: Regular coating applications can minimize maintenance expenses over time.

Consult a roofing professional to determine the right type of coating for your flat roof and ensure it’s applied correctly for optimal protection.

The Key to Longevity For Flat Roofing in Calgary: Maintenance 

Proper maintenance is key to ensuring the longevity and functionality of your flat roof in Calgary, whether for your residence or commercial space. Regular inspections, keeping your roof clean, addressing ponding water, seeking professional assessments, and considering preventative roof coatings are all essential elements of flat roof maintenance. Remember that a well-maintained flat roof can save you money on repairs and replacement costs while providing peace of mind for years.

City Roofing & Exteriors consistently takes pride in serving Calgarians. At City Roofing, we understand the importance of customer satisfaction. We put safety, quality work and on time delivery as our top priority. We work hard to assist our customers in providing proper roofing systems to meet their budget and needs. We offer completed roofing services in Calgary and area on both residential and commercial projects. We guarantee that you will be satisfied with our work and recommend City Roofing as your roofing consultant and contractor. Give us a call at 403-608-9933 or send an email to cityroofing111@gmail.com.
